# `SpatialData.plot`

> [DEMO](https://helenalc.github.io/SpatialData.plot/articles/SpatialData.plot.html)

    BiocManager::install("HelenaLC/SpatialData")
    BiocManager::install("HelenaLC/SpatialData.plot")

Some vignette examples rely on data deposited at Bioconductor’s OSN
bucket. To *interrogate* these, you will need to install
[paws](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/paws/index.html); it is
not necessary for retrievals.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`blobs`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/reference/blobs.md)
  : \`SpatialData\` .zarr toy datasets

- [`plotShape(`*`<SpatialData>`*`)`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/reference/plotFrame.md)
  [`plotPoint(`*`<SpatialData>`*`)`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/reference/plotFrame.md)
  :

  `SpatialData` point/shape viz.

- [`plotImage(`*`<SpatialData>`*`)`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/reference/plotImage.md)
  [`plotSpatialData()`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/reference/plotImage.md)
  :

  `SpatialData` image viz.

- [`plotLabel(`*`<SpatialData>`*`)`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/reference/plotLabel.md)
  :

  `SpatialData` label viz.

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [\`SpatialData.plot\`](https://HelenaLC.github.io/SpatialData.plot/articles/SpatialData.plot.md):
